name: Oreo Cookie Crusted No_bake White Chocolate C
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixer, cream together butter and sugar for approximately 2 minutes.
2. Add cream cheese and vanilla and continue creaming until smooth, about 10 more minutes.
3. Set up a double boiler to melt the white chocolate. Once melted, add it to the cream cheese mixture and mix until fully incorporated.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared Oreo crust and spread evenly.
5. Place in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours or until set.
6. Cut into eighths and serve with your favorite fruit sauce.
